title: toona sureni var. cochinchinensis
intro: Toona sureni var. cochinchinensis, also known as the Cochinchinensis variety of Toona sureni, is a plant species that belongs to the family Meliaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Toona sureni var. cochinchinensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Toona sureni var. cochinchinensis can be found in traditional medicine, often used as teas, infusions, or extracts to harness its medicinal properties.
